title: Re:Zero Respawn Sound Effect
description: This mod plays a sound effect when the player respawns after dying.
body:
This mod plays the Re:Zero respawn sound effect whenever you respawn after dying. I recommend turning on instant respawn and pairing this mod with [Hardcore Lite - You Die You Lose a Heart (LifeDrain)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hardcore-lite).

Demonstration video:
